test_framework: manual verification (video output inspection with ffprobe)
verification_instructions: Run the upgraded script, verify output video exists, has audio+video streams, and duration matches ~60.7s
snapshot_or_generated_files: output_with_subtitles.mp4 is the final deliverable, background.png is an intermediate artifact
setup_instructions: pip install Pillow numpy (already installed). ffmpeg available at /usr/local/bin/ffmpeg. Noto Sans font at /usr/share/fonts/google-noto-vf/NotoSans[wght].ttf
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET. Python 3.9 via pyenv. Pillow 11.3.0 installed. ffmpeg available. No moviepy needed - using Pillow for image generation and ffmpeg for video composition.
contribution_requirements: Commit the updated script, background image, and output video to the repository
key_patterns: Single script pipeline. Use Pillow to generate a dark/ambient background image programmatically (no external downloads). Use ffmpeg complex filter chains for transitions, fades, and dynamic subtitle effects. Audio must be codec-copied (untouched).
directory_structure: Flat repo: source video, script, SRT file, audio, output video all at root level
